parameters.subject: 拉取国内生产数据成功-get_mesdailydata

parameters.query:
SELECT b.retroid_id
FROM mes.machine_data a
JOIN mes.retroid b ON a.retroid_id::int = b.retroid_id
WHERE a.createtime BETWEEN '{{ $json.startdate }}' AND '{{ $json.enddate }}'
and 
procedure_detail_id = 58 ;

WITH latest_binding AS (
  SELECT
    md.*
  FROM
    mes.machine_data md
  JOIN (
    SELECT
      retroid_id,
      procedure_detail_id,
      MAX(machine_data_id) AS max_id
    FROM
      mes.machine_data
    WHERE
      procedure_detail_id IN (39, 42, 31, 50, 59)
      AND retroid_id = '{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
    GROUP BY
      retroid_id,
      procedure_detail_id
  ) latest ON
    md.retroid_id = latest.retroid_id
    AND md.procedure_detail_id = latest.procedure_detail_id
    AND md.machine_data_id = latest.max_id
  		UNION ALL
SELECT *
FROM mes.machine_data
WHERE procedure_detail_id = 148
  AND retroid_id = '{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
  AND data ->> 'mac' IS NOT NULL
),
all_unbinding AS (
  SELECT
    ub.*
  FROM
    mes.machine_data ub
  WHERE
    ub.procedure_detail_id = 62
    AND ub.retroid_id = '{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
)
SELECT * FROM latest_binding
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM all_unbinding;

nodes.name: 查询当日最新生产数据

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    r.retroid_id,
    r.retroid,
    j.joborder_number,
    j.phase,
    i.product_model_name
FROM 
    mes.retroid r
JOIN 
    mes.joborder j ON r.joborder_id = j.joborder_id
JOIN 
    mes.product_info p ON j.product_id = p.product_id
JOIN 
    mes.product_model i ON p.product_model_id = i.product_model_id 
where r.retroid_id = {{ $json.retroid_id }};

SELECT b.retroid_id
FROM mes.machine_data a
JOIN mes.retroid b ON a.retroid_id::int = b.retroid_id
WHERE a.createtime BETWEEN '{{ $json.startdate }}' AND '{{ $json.enddate }}'
and 
procedure_detail_id = 58 ;

WITH latest_binding AS (
  SELECT
    md.*
  FROM
    mes.machine_data md
  JOIN (
    SELECT
      retroid_id,
      procedure_detail_id,
      MAX(machine_data_id) AS max_id
    FROM
      mes.machine_data
    WHERE
      procedure_detail_id IN (39, 42, 31, 50, 59)
      AND retroid_id = '{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
    GROUP BY
      retroid_id,
      procedure_detail_id
  ) latest ON
    md.retroid_id = latest.retroid_id
    AND md.procedure_detail_id = latest.procedure_detail_id
    AND md.machine_data_id = latest.max_id
),
all_unbinding AS (
  SELECT
    ub.*
  FROM
    mes.machine_data ub
  WHERE
    ub.procedure_detail_id = 62
    AND ub.retroid_id = '{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
)
SELECT * FROM latest_binding
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM all_unbinding;

JOIN

where r.retroid_id = {{ $json.retroid_id }};
